basic.question_text: 查询每部电影的标题和年份，按年份降序排列，只取前 5 部。
basic.question_context: 回顾查询执行顺序：FROM → WHERE → SELECT → ORDER BY → LIMIT。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, year FROM movies ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 5;
hints: ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT title, year FROM movies ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT title, year FROM movies ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 5;

basic.question_text: 查询**每位导演的电影数量**。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT director, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY director;
hints: 注意执行顺序：FROM → GROUP BY → SELECT
SELECT director, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY director;
SELECT director, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY director;

basic.question_text: 查询每位导演电影的**总票房（国内+国际）**。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales + international_sales) AS total FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director;
hints: 执行顺序：FROM + JOIN → GROUP BY → SELECT
SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales+international_sales) FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director;
SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales+international_sales) FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director;

basic.question_text: 查询**电影数量大于 1 的导演**及其电影数量，按数量降序。
basic.question_context: GROUP BY + HAVING + ORDER BY。执行顺序：FROM → GROUP BY → HAVING → SELECT → ORDER BY。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT director, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM movies GROUP BY director HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC;
accept_alternatives: SELECT director, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY director HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
hints: HAVING 在 GROUP BY 之后执行，用于过滤分组
SELECT director, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY director HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
SELECT director, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY director HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

basic.question_text: 以下 SQL 在 SELECT 中定义了别名 'movie_count'，能否在 WHERE 子句中使用这个别名？为什么？
basic.question_context: SELECT director, COUNT(*) AS movie_count FROM movies WHERE movie_count > 1 GROUP BY director; —— 这是错误的！因为 WHERE 在 SELECT 之前执行。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT director, COUNT(*) AS movie_count FROM movies GROUP BY director HAVING movie_count > 1;
hints: WHERE 在 SELECT 之前执行，看不到别名。应该用 HAVING
参考上一题的正确答案
SELECT director, COUNT(*) AS movie_count FROM movies GROUP BY director HAVING movie_count > 1;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**票房最高的 3 位导演**的姓名和总票房。完整的链：JOIN → GROUP BY → ORDER BY → LIMIT。
intermediate.question_context: 执行顺序：FROM+JOIN → GROUP BY → SELECT → ORDER BY → LIMIT。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales + international_sales) AS total FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3;
hints: ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales+international_sales) AS total FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales+international_sales) AS total FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**在 2005 年之后发行的电影中，评分最高的 3 部**。
intermediate.question_context: WHERE → JOIN → ORDER BY → LIMIT。注意 WHERE 在 JOIN 之前过滤。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, rating, year FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE year > 2005 ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 3;
hints: WHERE year > 2005 先过滤行，然后 JOIN，再 ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT title, rating, year FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id WHERE year>2005 ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT title, rating, year FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id WHERE year>2005 ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 3;

intermediate.question_text: 在 SELECT 中能用 ORDER BY 的别名吗？写一条 SQL 验证：查标题和年份，给 year 起别名 release_year，按 release_year 排序。
intermediate.question_context: SELECT 在 ORDER BY 之前执行，所以 ORDER BY 可以使用别名。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, year AS release_year FROM movies ORDER BY release_year;
accept_alternatives: SELECT title, year AS release_year FROM movies ORDER BY release_year DESC;
hints: ORDER BY 可以用 SELECT 中定义的别名
SELECT title, year AS release_year FROM movies ORDER BY release_year;
SELECT title, year AS release_year FROM movies ORDER BY release_year;

intermediate.question_text: 为什么 ORDER BY 可以使用别名但 WHERE 不行？请用执行顺序解释，然后用正确的 SQL 查片长超过 100 分钟的电影中每部电影的 director 和最高评分。
intermediate.question_context: 执行顺序：FROM → WHERE → GROUP BY → HAVING → SELECT → ORDER BY → LIMIT。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT director, MAX(rating) FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE length_minutes > 100 GROUP BY director;
hints: WHERE 在第2步执行，SELECT 在第5步，所以 WHERE 看不到 SELECT 的别名
SELECT director, MAX(rating) FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id WHERE length_minutes>100 GROUP BY director;
SELECT director, MAX(rating) FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id WHERE length_minutes>100 GROUP BY director;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**总票房超过 6 亿的导演**及票房总和，按票房降序。
intermediate.question_context: JOIN → GROUP BY → HAVING SUM(...) > 600000000 → ORDER BY。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales + international_sales) AS total FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director HAVING total > 600000000 ORDER BY total DESC;
hints: HAVING SUM(domestic_sales+international_sales) > 600000000
SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales+international_sales) AS total FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director HAVING total>600000000 ORDER BY total DESC;
SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales+international_sales) AS total FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director HAVING total>600000000 ORDER BY total DESC;

challenge.question_text: 设计一条 SQL 证明 LIMIT 在 ORDER BY 之后执行。查询片长最短的 3 部电影，但如果先 LIMIT 再 ORDER BY 结果会不同。
challenge.question_context: 正确的顺序：ORDER BY length_minutes ASC LIMIT 3。错误的假设：如果 LIMIT 先执行会随机取 3 条再排序。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes ASC LIMIT 3;
hints: 如果 LIMIT 先于 ORDER BY，结果会是随机的3条排序
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes ASC LIMIT 3;
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes ASC LIMIT 3;
